title: CA LCFS Quarterly Trendsheet - Q3 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

Q3 2025 Credit generation totaled 8.33 MMT representing a 15.88% decline from Q2 2025 and a 16% decline on a YOY basis. Credits generated from fuels declined by 22% on a YOY basis (16% decline from Q2) while Electricity credits rose 4% on a YOY basis (6.8% decline from Q2). Q3 Deficits stood at 10.04 MMT, rising 54% from Q2 2025 and 70.83% on a YoY basis. On a YOY basis, the Gasoline pool volume remained broadly flat but the Diesel pool contracted by 8.5%. Credits from Renewable Diesel decreased 34.42% YoY (down 27.76% QoQ) with volumes falling to reach 538.60 mgal. The RD volume declined despite EIA data showing a rising trend in quarterly RD production from the start of the year.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
